title: Not Enough Emeralds
description: a vanilla style mod that adds emerald armor, tools, and weapons, with special villager loyalty and golem protection features.
body:
## Available on: [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/not-enough-emeralds-by-zee99)

**Warning**:  Some NeoForge versions of this mod may not include all features. Scroll down to “Missing Features” to see what they’re missing.![Emerald gear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f59681b1354ea9a4ed3e8629d00c3998a10d7d8.png)
Not Enough Emeralds is a vanilla style mod that adds emerald armor, tools, weapons, emerald horse armor, and emerald Nautilus armor!

**Features & Mechanics**
Emerald Armor, Tools & Weapons

Crafted like other gear, but using emeralds.

*Emerald equipment* is designed as middle tier gear  between iron and diamond, making it stronger than iron but not as strong as diamond.

Emerald equipment also has high enchantability, with tools and weapons having *18 enchantability* and armor having *22 enchantability*.

**Familiar Face Effect** 

Wearing emerald armor gives you an effect called Familiar Face.

While Familiar Face is active, you can sneak-right-click villagers to have them follow you. Sneak right click again to have them stop.

Familiar Face also makes villager trades cheaper!

The more emerald armor pieces you wear, the higher your Familiar Face level becomes.

**Familiar Face levels**:

- Familiar Face I = 1 armor piece, 20% trade discount
- Familiar Face II = 2 armor pieces, 30% trade discount
- Familiar Face III = 3 armor pieces, 40% trade discount
- Familiar Face IV = full emerald armor set, 50% trade discount

Nearby iron golems will also protect you if you are attacked, even by other players.

merald Horse Armor & Emerald Nautilus Armor

Emerald horse armor and Emerald Nautilus armor cannot be crafted.

They can only be found as loot in certain structures.

**Emerald horse armor** can be found in:

- Desert Pyramids
- Jungle Temples
- Mineshafts
- Woodland Mansions
- Pillager Outposts
- Village Blacksmith/Weaponsmith houses
- Trial Chambers

**Emerald Nautilus armor** can be found in:

- Shipwrecks
- Ocean Ruins
- Buried Treasure

**Missing Features**

The following versions are currently missing villager trade discounts,  emerald horse armor, and some smaller mechanics/bug fixes:

- NeoForge 1.21.8 
- NeoForge 1.21.5 
- NeoForge 1.21.4 

# Feedback

If you have any suggestions or notice any bugs, feel free to share them in the 
[CurseForge Comments](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/not-enough-emeralds-by-zee99/comments)
